Copied

Since 1998, Laszlo Vajda has helped multiple countries with bidding for the Olympics and also organizing them, including the 2008 Beijing Summer Games and 2022 Beijing Winter Games. Vajda, a professor at Capital University of Physical Education, also serves as the secretary of International Teqball Federation. He talks about his experience across different Olympic Games and how he is trying to push Teqball to get the recognition of the International Olympic Committee.
